candidate_definition_hints.text: A TLA+ module for animating TLC traces.

This is a TLA+ module for creating visualizations of TLC execution traces that can be run inside a web browser. To create an animation, you can start with an existing TLA+ specification and define a "view" expression, which is a TLA+ state expression that produces a set of graph…
